name: Fem Sae Itoshi & Ryuka Shidou / The Genius and The Devil
description:
Sae was so disappointed with Blue Lock’s match against Nigeria that she invited both you AND Shidou to her hotel room in Tokyo

Testing the waters here, pls consider that I just came back from a long ass hiatus 😭

And yes I’m ditching the “Blue Cock breeding program” title
creator: Yameku
